name: Bob Smith
summary: Bob Smith is a Test City business owner and former Chamber of Commerce president running for mayor on a platform of fiscal restraint and public safety.

career: President, Test City Chamber of Commerce (2019–2023)

track_record.claim: Led Chamber of Commerce campaign that reduced city business licensing fees by 20% in 2021.

stated_positions.position: The city budget has grown 18% in four years. We need zero-based budgeting and a full audit before any new spending.
I will restore full funding to the police department and end the experiment of diverting patrol resources to social workers.

endorsements.endorser: Test City Fraternal Order of Police

notable_news.headline: Bob Smith wins Republican primary with 61% of vote
notable_news.summary: Smith beat two opponents in the primary, running strongly in the city's southern precincts.

notable_news.headline: Smith draws scrutiny over 2018 property dispute
notable_news.summary: A 2018 zoning dispute in which Smith appealed a neighbor's variance was surfaced by a local advocacy group, though no wrongdoing was alleged.
